title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses database company emergence cycles, scaling infrastructure at Shopify during flash sales, and the role of AI coding in modern engineering. He reflects on P99 engineer hiring and the future of database systems in an AI-driven era.
